The '''''Sentinel''''' was a [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], located at [[Kothlis II]]. It was constructed to ensure that the main facility on Kothlis II was well-defended from attacks by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

During the [[Battle of Kothlis]], the Rebel Alliance facilities were attacked by the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] and the [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']], which were sent by the Galactic Empire to recover a stolen computer that contained the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] plans. ''Sentinel'' was the closer target and was bombarded by [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] from the ''Avenger''. The base was finally destroyed from concentrated enemy fire, leaving Kothlis II vulnerable.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
